Recurso v0.1.1 is out — subscriber migration importer and one-command demo data
recurso
ProductDocsPricingCompare
Star on GitHubGet started

Bill your customers.
Own your billing.

Recurso is the open-source billing engine for SaaS — subscriptions, invoicing, GST-native India compliance, and an immutable financial ledger. MIT licensed, self-hosted, and no percentage-of-revenue tax as you grow.

Start self-hostingJoin the Cloud waitlist

MIT licensed · Go + PostgreSQL + TigerBeetle · Stripe & Razorpay

zero to seeded dashboard — one command
$ git clone https://github.com/swapnull-in/recur-so.git && cd recur-so
$ make demo
Starting postgres, tigerbeetle, mailhog… done
Running migrations… 42 applied
🌱 Seeding demo data…
Tenant: Demo Tenant · Plans: Starter, Pro, Scale
12 customers · 9 subscriptions · 14 invoices · 2 coupons
API ready → http://localhost:8080
Dashboard → http://localhost:5173
Demo API key → sk_test_12345

Product

Everything a billing stack needs

Six modules that work together as one engine. Use the whole stack or start with the pieces you need — it all runs on your infrastructure.

Explore the concepts

Billing Core

The full subscription lifecycle — plans, trials, upgrades, and invoices that generate themselves.

  • Trials, upgrades, cancellations, proration
  • Usage metering & metered billing
  • Coupons, quotes & credit notes

Payments

Stripe and Razorpay behind one API, with smart gateway routing per currency.

  • Stripe + Razorpay with smart routing
  • UPI AutoPay mandates
  • Hosted checkout & multi-currency FX

Tax & Compliance

India-first tax that is built in, not bolted on — and jurisdiction-aware beyond it.

  • GST with Place of Supply & HSN codes
  • e-Invoicing (IRN/GSP) workflows
  • EU VAT & zero-rated export invoices

Revenue & Finance

An immutable double-entry ledger your accountant can actually sign off on.

  • Double-entry ledger on TigerBeetle
  • Revenue recognition
  • QuickBooks/Xero sync & daily reconciliation

Retention

Recover failed payments and keep customers before they churn.

  • Configurable dunning campaigns
  • Smart retries with exponential backoff
  • Customer self-service portal & cancel flows

Platform

A developer platform first: everything is an API with events you can trust.

  • REST API + OpenAPI 3.1 at /openapi.json
  • Typed Node SDK — 15 resources, 56 methods
  • Signed webhooks & event delivery

Developer experience

Plan → customer → subscription in three calls

A predictable REST API with an OpenAPI 3.1 spec served straight from your instance, plus a typed Node SDK. Amounts are in minor units, every list is paginated, and webhooks are HMAC-signed.

API reference Node SDK on GitHub
quickstart.sh
# 1. Create a plan
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/plans \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer your-api-key" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "name": "Pro Plan",
    "interval": "month",
    "prices": [
      { "amount": 4999, "currency": "INR" },
      { "amount": 999, "currency": "USD" }
    ]
  }'

# 2. Add a customer
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/customers \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer your-api-key" \
  -d '{ "name": "Acme Corp", "email": "billing@acme.com" }'

# 3. Start a subscription
curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/v1/subscriptions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer your-api-key" \
  -d '{ "customer_id": "cust_abc", "plan_id": "plan_pro", "payment_gateway": "razorpay" }'

Compliance

Built for India, ready for the world

Most billing tools treat Indian tax as an afterthought. Recurso starts there — and bills globally with the same ledger underneath.

Built for India

Compliance that ships in the box — not a bolted-on integration.

  • GST engine — CGST/SGST/IGST split with Place of Supply rules and HSN codes
  • e-Invoicing — IRN generation workflows via GSP, ready for the e-invoice mandate
  • UPI AutoPay mandates — Recurring mandates with real revocation, via Razorpay
  • Razorpay native — First-class gateway support, including TDS tracking on the books

Ready for the world

The same engine bills in any currency, through the right gateway.

  • Multi-currency — Price plans in INR, USD, EUR and more, with FX rate handling
  • Stripe routing — Smart per-currency gateway routing between Stripe and Razorpay
  • EU VAT — Jurisdiction-aware tax resolution by seller and buyer location
  • Export invoices — Indian non-INR invoices zero-rated with LUT-aware notes

Open source

Your billing system should not be a black box

Billing touches every rupee and dollar you earn. Recurso keeps the code, the data, and the roadmap in the open — on your infrastructure, under your control.

Explore the repositoryJoin the discussion

MIT licensed

Fork it, extend it, ship it. No open-core bait — the whole billing engine is in the repo.

Read the license

Public roadmap

ROADMAP.md is a living document — what shipped, what is next, and in what order.

View the roadmap

Contributions welcome

Good first issues, contributor docs, and an e2e suite so you can change billing code with confidence.

CONTRIBUTING.md

Pricing

Predictable pricing, no revenue tax

Start free with self-hosted. Move to managed cloud when you want us to run it. Either way, we never take a percentage of your revenue.

Open Source

Self-host on your own infrastructure

Freeforever
  • Unlimited subscriptions
  • Multi-gateway payments
  • Usage metering
  • Invoicing & credit notes
  • API & webhooks
  • Community support
  • Priority support
  • Managed hosting

Start owning your billing tonight

One command from clone to a seeded dashboard. Free forever on your own infrastructure — or get in line for Recurso Cloud.

Start self-hosting

git clone https://github.com/swapnull-in/recur-so.git && make demo

recurso

The open-source billing engine for SaaS. Built with Go, PostgreSQL, and TigerBeetle. MIT licensed.
